'''jonazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uterotrophic|uterotrophic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uterotrophic|uterotrophic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jonazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || jonazithi || jonaziji || jonazishi || jonaziki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || jonazuthu || jonazuju || jonazushu || jonazuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || jonazuthu || jonazuju || jonazushu || jonazuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || jonazufthuf || jonazufjuf || jonazufshuf || jonazufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || jonazethe || jonazeje || jonazeshe || jonazeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || jonazotho || jonazojo || jonazosho || jonazoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || jonazotho || jonazojo || jonazosho || jonazoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || jonazofthof || jonazofjof || jonazofshof || jonazofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jonazïfthïf || jonazïfjïf || jonazïfshïf || jonazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jonazïfthïf || jonazïfjïf || jonazïfshïf || jonazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jonazïfthïf || jonazïfjïf || jonazïfshïf || jonazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jonazïfthïf || jonazïfjïf || jonazïfshïf || jonazïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || jonazæthæ || jonazæjæ || jonazæshæ || jonazækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || jonazatha || jonazaja || jonazasha || jonazaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || jonazatha || jonazaja || jonazasha || jonazaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || jonazafthaf || jonazafjaf || jonazafshaf || jonazafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || jonazasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || jonazshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || jonazroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || jonazmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || jonazyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojonaznkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojonaznkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojonaznkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojonaznkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || jonanazasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || jonanazshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || jonanazroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || jonanazmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || jonanazyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojonanaznkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojonanaznkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojonanaznkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojonanaznkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || jenæzasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || jenæzshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || jenæzroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || jenæzmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || jenæzyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojenæznkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojenæznkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojenæznkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojenæznkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || jonfazasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || jonfazshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || jonfazroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || jonfazmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || jonfazyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojonfaznkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojonfaznkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojonfaznkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojonfaznkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
